rulings.Case Title: RICHARD LANE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Swinerton Builders¿ motion for summary judgment is off calendar. Defendant was dismissed on August 25. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM HAYNES et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION, LTD. et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Pneumo Abex LLC¿s motion for summary judgment is granted in part and taken off calendar in part. It is off calendar as to the third, fourth, fifth, sixth and seventh causes of action since they have been dismissed. It is granted to all other issues. No opposition filed. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JOHNNY LEE FULLER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Flowserve US Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN BURNS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Collins Electrical Company, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff¿s declaration and Mr. Ay¿s declaration create a triable issue whether Mr. Burns was exposed to asbestos-containing fireproofing attributable to defendant. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL STARR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. Defendant Monterey Mechanical Company¿s motion for summary judgment is continued to October 14, 2010 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220 per the September 21 order. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY PETERSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 6. Defendant Emil J. Weber Electric Co.¿s demurrer to plaintiffs¿ first amended complaint is sustained with ten days leave to amend. =(220/HEK)
